Retrieve the clip polygon used during preprocessing

Source: R/get_clip.R
get_clip.Rd

Reconstructs the clip polygon that was supplied to preprocess_species() from the metadata stored on the BirdFlow object. Returns an sf polygon in the model's CRS (crs(x)).

Usage

get_clip(x)

Arguments

x

A BirdFlow model.

Value

An sf object containing the clip polygon, or NULL if the model is unclipped or the clip metadata is unknown (older models preprocessed before this metadata was captured).

Details

The polygon is stored as a flat data frame (see clip_to_dataframe()) so it can be serialized as part of the model. get_clip() delegates the data-frame-to-polygon conversion to dataframe_to_clip() and wraps the result in an sf object; pass the result through terra::vect() if you'd prefer a terra::SpatVector.

See also

is_clipped(), preprocess_species(), dataframe_to_clip().

Examples

  library(BirdFlowModels)
  get_clip(amewoo) # NULL — fixture predates clip metadata
#> NULL
